Top block: kin cluster list — page is damaged at Awashowet/Anashuecot head
Bow-and-arrow? Actually Mommocke (?) mark — NOT Anashuecot
"left as a guardan by his father Tocomiquian" — Absolom affidavit line
Absolom Couniseler his Mark

What this image PROVES for the audit

1. Bow-and-arrow visible ≠ Anashuecot's mark. The top of p.22 is torn/missing where Anashuecot's name/mark would be. The visible mark belongs to the kin cluster (Mommocke/Seecomp/Tyuwasha group). You cannot claim Anashuecot had a bow-and-arrow mark from this image — page loss.

2. Tocomiquian line: "left as a gaurdan by his father Tocomiquian Lamey should not deprive him of his lands" — This is Awassecouse left as guardian? Actually text: Absolom says Awassecouse did possess... So Tocomiquian is father of Awassecouse, not yet proven father of Joane. This is why top-of-page "Father of Joan" claim is premature.

3. Gender identifier: No "his marke" / "her marke" visible in this version for Anashuecot — because that portion is missing. Rocky Mountain transcript that adds "his marke" has zero backup in this primary — unverified transcription layer.
